leadText: The Black Flute (Japanese: くろいビードロ Black Vidro) is a type of item introduced in Generation III. It is one of the flutes.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation III to IV 1.2 Generation V to Pokémon X and Y 1.3 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III to IV [ edit | edit source ] When used in the field, it reduces wild Pokémon encounter rate by 50%. This effect lasts until a map transition takes place. Generation V to Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] The Black Flute serves no practical purpose other than to be sold . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] When used in the field, it increases the level of wild Pokémon by 1 to 4 levels. The effect disappears when the player leaves the area.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods R S E Route 113 Glass Workshop (1000 steps) FR LG Trade Colo XD Trade D P Pt Mt. Coronet Pt HG SS Dark Cave B W Route 13 (treasure hunter) B2 W2 Route 13 (treasure hunter) X Y Trade OR AS Route 113 Glass Workshop (1000 grams)

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description R S E A glass flute that keeps away wild Pok é mon . FR LG A black glass flute. When blown, it makes wild Pok é mon less likely to appear. Colo XD An item brought over from a faraway place. D P Pt HG SS A black flute made from blown glass. Its melody makes wild Pokémon less likely to appear. B W B2 W2 A toy flute made from black glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price. X Y A lovely toy flute to admire. It's made from black glass. OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A flute made from black glass. It makes it easier to encounter strong Pokémon in the place you use it. S V A flute made from black glass. It makes it easier to encounter high-level Pokémon in the place you use it.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.2.1 Generation III to IV 1.2.2 Generation V to Pokémon X and Y 1.2.3 Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price R S E FR LG D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS N/A $ 200 S M US UM N/A $ 10 In the Generation V games, the Black Flute can be sold to the billionaire maniac in Undella Town for $ 8000. Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation III to IV [ edit | edit source ] When used in the field, it reduces wild Pokémon encounter rate by 50%. This effect lasts until a map transition takes place. Generation V to Pokémon X and Y [ edit | edit source ] The Black Flute serves no practical purpose other than to be sold . Pokémon Omega Ruby and Alpha Sapphire [ edit | edit source ] When used in the field, it increases the level of wild Pokémon by 1 to 4 levels. The effect disappears when the player leaves the area. It makes it easier to encounter strong Pokémon in the place you use it. S V A flute made from black glass. It makes it easier to encounter high-level Pokémon in the place you use it.
